title: chore: update app metrics 2026-06-27
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Watering the Apps
gist.blurb: Our automated bots just finished their daily rounds, updating health metrics and stats for all community apps in the greenhouse.
gist.summary: Automated daily update of community app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse statistics in APPS.md and GREENHOUSE.md.
gist.impact: Ensures the community app directory reflects the latest health statuses and usage data.
gist.visual_concept: A chunky robot watering plants in a greenhouse, representing the automated health checks and metrics updates for the community apps. Polly the bee hovering nearby with a clipboard.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of a chunky robot with a CRT monitor head watering glowing code-plants in a digital greenhouse. The cute bee mascot hovers nearby holding a tiny clipboard. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and warm peach gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
